vllm.title: Improve detokenization performance
vllm.author: Yard1
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Two main changes:

if we are using a fast tokenizer, we do not enter the slow _convert_tokens_to_string_with_added_encoders loop as the fast tokenizers do not use it in base transformers
Use cached properties for added_tokens_encoder and all_special_tokens.

Those 2 changes improved detokenization s

vllm.title: Bump up transformers version & Remove MistralConfig
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Now that MistralConfig is officially supported by the stable release of HF transformers, we can remove our MistralConfig.

vllm.title: Fix the issue for AquilaChat2-* models
vllm.author: lu-wang-dl
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The architectures  of BAAI/AquilaChat2-34B and BAAI/AquilaChat2-7B are AquilaForCausalLM. When loading the model, it will show error:
ValueError: Model architectures ['AquilaForCausalLM'] are not supported for now. Supported architectures: ['AquilaModel', 'BaiChuanForCausalLM', 'BaichuanForCausalLM'
